page_content: SURV656 Web Survey Methodology (2 Credits) Fundamental concepts of web surveys and web survey design. The course is organized in 3 main sections which follow the way a proper web survey is organized: preﬁelding, ﬁelding and post ﬁelding. Prerequisite: Must have completed SURV400; or must have completed SURV623; or permission of instructor. And permission of BSOS-Joint Program in Survey Methodology department.
